_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Undertake a comprehensive review of the company’s data and privacy projects and ensure that they are consistent with corporate privacy and data security goals and policies.
reference_document_element_description: Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing activities, ensuring privacy considerations are integrated into design and procurement decisions before processing begins.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-006 (SP, cosine: 0.623), SP-K-003 (SP, cosine: 0.582).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.675). Shared vocabulary: [data, privacy, projects]. DCWF-only terms [company, comprehensive, consistent, corporate, ensure, goals] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, advise, begins, considerations, decisions, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.894, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 26-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Undertake a comprehensive review of the company’s data and privacy projects and" and "Advise on data protection implications of new projects, systems, and processing" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.651 ≈ STS 0.675 (gap 0.024). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, privacy, projects] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [data, privacy, projects]. DCWF-only: [company, comprehensive, consistent, corporate, ensure, goals]. WIDAI-only: [activities, advise, begins, considerations, decisions, design].
